name: TableVirtualizerProps
description: A Virtualizer configured with the table layout used by Table.

rowHeight.description:
The fixed height of a row in pixels.
Defaults to the current density height: 32 compact, 40 default, 48 comfortable.

headingHeight.description:
The fixed height of the header in pixels.
Defaults to the current density height: 32 compact, 40 default, 48 comfortable.

children.description: The child collection to virtualize (e.g. ListBox, GridList, or Table).
